Selected gemini-flash for direct transcription of the Latin "Arrearagia Recepta", as per instructions to use text as it appears. gpt-5-mini provided an English interpretation.
Selected gemini-flash for visual accuracy of "fixed" matching the image, rather than gpt-5-mini's "Interest".

Selected gemini-flash. Description "Bampton" is visually accurate. The amount '12 -' is clearly aligned under the shillings column in the image, making 12 shillings correct. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed it in the pounds column.

rows.notes: Consensus between both extractors. Both correctly identified the amount '4.19 -' as 4 pounds, 19 shillings.

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual inspection confirms there is no amount on this line in the ledger. gemini-flash incorrectly assigned '4. 4 -' to this row, which belongs to the preceding row.

rows.notes: Consensus between both extractors. The description is clear.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms the pounds digit is '228', not '220' as stated by gpt-5-mini. Description and remaining amount components are consistent.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation received from Kidlington, amounting to £228 7s 10d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for description "S. Newington Rectory" and the fractional amount '0.25'. Visual inspection clearly shows '1/4' (0.25), not '3/4' (0.75). Both extractors agreed on pounds, shillings, and whole pence.
rows.english_description: Rent received from the S. Newington Rectory.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from the S. Newington Rectory, amounting to £13 2s 9.25d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for description "Garsington (Clinkard)" and the fractional amount '0.25'. Visual inspection clearly shows '1/4' (0.25), not '3/4' (0.75). Both extractors agreed on pounds, shillings, and whole pence.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Garsington, amounting to £13 2s 9.25d.

rows.notes: Consensus between both extractors on description and amount (12.10.1). Gpt-5-mini noted slight unclarity in the final pence digit, which is visually accurate but '1' is the most reasonable interpretation.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Crooke, amounting to £12 10s 1d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for description "Clifton Perry" as visually accurate. Both extractors agreed on the amount '10.5.2 3/4'. Gpt-5-mini noted faded digits.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Clifton Perry, amounting to £10 5s 2.75d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for its accurate reading of the pence as empty (indicated by '-'). Visual inspection confirms no pence digit. Description "Bensington" also seems more accurate than gpt-5-mini's interpretation, though some fading is present.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Bensington, amounting to £5.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for its accurate transcription of the description "Copson — (Arr. Rec)" and correct interpretation of empty pence (denoted by '='). Gpt-5-mini incorrectly inferred 0 pence.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears collected from Copson, amounting to £9 10s.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Description "Rusher" is clearly visible above the amount. Visual inspection of '502 3/' shows '502' in pounds, '3' in shillings. The trailing '/' is ambiguous but is most likely a stylistic mark or separator, not a numerical pence digit. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly inferred 9 pence and interpreted description.

This row was missed by gemini-flash. Extracted from gpt-5-mini, which correctly identified the subtotal '172.14 -'. Visual inspection confirms this distinct line with amounts 172 pounds, 14 shillings, and empty pence.
Selected gemini-flash for direct transcription of the Latin "Recepta Anni praesentes", which is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's interpretation and slightly different spelling.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual inspection confirms description "Kidlington Augmentation" and amount "2.15 -" (2 pounds, 15 shillings). gemini-flash incorrectly assigned the '172.14' amount from the preceding (missed) subtotal row to this description, demonstrating a line shift error.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation received from Kidlington, amounting to £2 15s.

rows.notes: Visual inspection shows description "Garston Rectory Tenement" (closer to gemini-flash's reading) and amount "1.18 -" (1 pound, 18 shillings, from gpt-5-mini). gemini-flash's amount was incorrect due to a line shift error from a previously missed row.
rows.english_description: Rent received from Garston Rectory Tenement.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Garston Rectory Tenement, amounting to £1 18s.

rows.notes: Visual inspection override for the amount. Both extractors misaligned amounts due to the row missing/shifting. Description "Kidlington Eaton & Brown" is from gemini-flash as it is more visually accurate. Amount "10.4.11" is read directly from the image.
rows.english_description: Rent received from Kidlington Eaton & Brown.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Kidlington Eaton & Brown, amounting to £10 4s 11d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for description "Rusher", which is clearly visible on the image. Both extractors correctly identified the amount '10.4.11'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment received for Rusher, amounting to £10 4s 11d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for description "Garsington Crooke" as it is directly transcribed. Both extractors agreed on the amount '187.11.11'. Visual inspection confirms the amount is double-underlined and heavily struck through on the page.
Consensus between both extractors. Clear header.

Selected gemini-flash for description "Dividend on 1420 £ = 1.0" (visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's "14th") and its correct explanation of '1.0' being part of the description. Both extractors agreed on the amount.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Another payment of the same dividend, amounting to £19 3s 8d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for correct interpretation of an empty description for this final total. Visual inspection confirms no description text. Both extractors agreed on the total amount '38.7.4', which is double-underlined.
